column2: Checking for Compliance Checklist in OA Pack
column3: ["Access the applicant's Operational Authorisation (OA) pack. ", 'Check if the OA pack has a compliance checklist. ', 'Review the OA pack and determine its completeness according to the provided compliance checklist. ', 'Determine if a valid case can be opened by the CAA case officer. ']
column4: ['The CAA case officer is able to access the OA pack. ', 'The OA pack does not have a compliance checklist. ', 'The OA pack is found incomplete because it lacks a compliance checklist. ', "A valid case cannot be opened as there's no complete compliance checklist provided with the OA pack. "]
